RegLoan Bank — Dealer Vehicle Invoice Document INV-0005 Page 1 of 1 Dealer: Sunrise Motors VIN: VIN48338AL Charges Line Description Qty Unit ($) Amount ($) 1 Kia Elantra base 1 38,645 38,645 2 Destination fee 1 1,012 1,012 3 Options package 1 2,034 2,034 4 Doc fee 1 387 387 5 Tax 1 2,180 2,180 Total: $44,258
